alien_source.applied_slice: Profile-backed GEMM memory-layout attempts: row-panel reuse and RHS transpose. Both failed the keep threshold, so no production source was retained.

target.profile_backing: Post-pass fj-lax linalg profiling kept matmul_2d as an explicit GEMM row: linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64. The bead targeted dense f64 GEMM cache blocking at tensor_contraction.rs::matmul_2d.
target.baseline_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64

one_lever.name: matmul_2d cache-block/data-layout candidates
one_lever.description: Measured row-blocking and transposed-RHS data-layout variants against the profile-backed 512x512x512 GEMM row. Production source was restored because no candidate met the keep threshold.

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64

candidates.name: row_block_8
candidates.reason: Only a marginal cross-worker signal and far below the bead's target; not enough confidence for a kept source change.

candidates.name: row_block_16
candidates.reason: Same-worker regression versus row_block_8 and no clear win versus baseline.

candidates.name: row_block_4
candidates.reason: Regression on the selected worker and no useful signal.

candidates.name: transposed_rhs_large_matrix_path
candidates.reason: Same-worker regression versus baseline: 25.393 ms -> 67.890 ms.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The tested row-block and transposed-RHS candidates were designed to preserve ascending-l accumulation for each c[i][j]. No candidate source is retained.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No pivoting, sorting, dispatch priority, comparison threshold, or output ordering change is retained.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No candidate source is retained. The existing i-k-j kernel remains covered by matmul_2d_ikj_bit_identical_to_ijk, which compares f64 bit patterns against the textbook i-j-k reference.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No random state, seed, sampling order, or nondeterministic iteration path is involved.
isomorphism_proof.shape_and_dtype: No production behavior change is retained; matmul_2d output shape and f64 dtype behavior are unchanged.

exit 0; existing benchmark-file unwrap/direct-index inventory reported, UBS embedded fmt/check/clippy sections passed

notes: The added 512x512x512 Criterion row remains as measurement coverage for future GEMM work.
Next deeper primitive: packed-panel/register-blocked safe-Rust GEMM microkernel that preserves per-output ascending-l order without partial-sum reassociation.
